name: First Kindred Don Quixote
description:
[Limbus Company La Manchaland Don Quixote AU]

WHEREIN IS TOLD THE STORY OF VALIANT DON QUIXOTE AND HIS SQUIRE
Don Quixote, ever since Bari's frequent visits, became incredibly interested in human affairs and most importantly, adventures. He dreams of becoming the greatest Fixer, seeking all there is life to offer. However, a valiant Fixer such as he cannot go alone, can he? And so, he invites you into his adventure of dreams.
(You can be either human or a Bloodfiend)
creator: Aerein
